text.title: Objection FAQ Library Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Objection FAQ Library. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: FAQ block contains 'Will this work for enterprise?'; no enterprise prospect ever asked.
antipattern.root-cause: objection-mined-not-invented rule violated; team brainstormed in conf room.
antipattern.fix: Mine lost-deal artifacts; replace invented entries with real-customer quotes.

antipattern.symptom: Objection: 'too expensive'; rebuttal: 'we offer great value'; close rate unchanged.
antipattern.root-cause: evidence-per-rebuttal rule violated; no proof point.
antipattern.fix: Add case study + ROI numbers + customer quote per rebuttal.

antipattern.symptom: Library built 14 months ago; new objections (AI / recession) absent; sales reps work around it.
antipattern.fix: Reinstate monthly review; add named curator; archive obsolete entries.
